name: Space Diamond Miner
description: Space Diamond Miner is a casual arcade game inspired by classic Gold Miner–style mechanics, set in a colorful space diamond mining universe. Players control an astronaut and use a hook to collect valuable diamonds hidden underground on alien planets. Each level has a time limit, encouraging precise timing and smart target selection. Collected diamonds can be spent on upgrades such as hook speed, hook size, extra time, and diamond value, creating a simple yet rewarding progression system.
instructions: Players launch a hook to grab underground diamonds and earn as much as possible before time runs out Timing target selection and upgrade choices are key to success Diamonds collected can be used to improve hook speed size time bonuses and diamond v
